overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a dark covered walkway through a neon-lit outdoor dining area, across an open plaza, through a covered pedestrian walkway with digital displays, and finally up stairs to an elevated street overlook with moving traffic.

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into brightly lit dining area with natural sunlight
entering the semi-covered ADVOCET outdoor dining patio

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark corridor with glowing teal floor lights toward a bright dining area ahead

notable_agents.action: server standing near railing looking out toward the dining area

large illuminated wall sign with ADVOCET text
shiny metallic purple chairs arranged around dining tables
transparent glass roof panels allowing sunlight to filter through

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, narrow corridor illuminated only by teal neon strips on the floor. As the camera moves forward, it emerges into a bright, semi-covered dining area with purple metallic chairs and a large ADVOCET sign visible in the distance. The transition from artificial to natural lighting is dramatic as the space opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale outdoor dining patio with purple furniture

agents.ego_description: navigating between tables in the outdoor dining area, passing seated patrons

notable_agents.action: patron in white suit reclining at table with drink
server walking through dining area carrying items

entered.detail: round tables with place settings and bottles
metal railings along the edge of the elevated dining area

segments.scene_description: Walking through the semi-covered ADVOCET dining area filled with purple metallic chairs and round tables. Patrons are seated enjoying their meals under a glass skylight, with sunlight casting grid-patterned shadows on the floor. The camera moves steadily through the space toward the far exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with scattered trash leading to underpass

events.description: exiting the dining area through metal doors into open plaza
entering covered area beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: leaving the restaurant through exit doors and crossing the open plaza toward an underpass

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench using phone

entered.detail: dark metal double doors marking the exit from the building
open paved area littered with scattered newspapers and trash
massive concrete structure spanning overhead with metal railings
wooden benches with people resting
newspapers and debris littering the ground

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dining area through metal doors into a bright open plaza scattered with trash and newspapers. The scene transitions from shaded interior to harsh midday sun, then moves under a massive concrete overpass. Wooden benches line the plaza where a few people are sitting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital art displays

events.description: entering area with purple neon light frames and digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway passing digital displays and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking toward the camera

entered.detail: semi-transparent ceiling panels with fluorescent lighting
vertical purple neon light strips framing wall displays
large digital screens showing abstract art and advertisements
yellow textured paving strips along the walkway edge
staircase leading upward visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by purple neon light frames and digital wall displays. The ceiling is lined with translucent panels and fluorescent lights. Yellow tactile paving marks the edge of the path as the camera approaches a concrete staircase at the far end.

events.description: reaching top of stairs and emerging onto elevated overlook with street view

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to reach an elevated viewpoint overlooking the street

entered.detail: teal-colored metal handrails along the staircase
elevated platform providing view of the street below
multiple vehicles driving on the multi-lane road below
tall digital advertisement screens on building facades
tall futuristic buildings lining the street

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete staircase with teal safety railings, transitioning from the enclosed walkway to an elevated overlook. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens to reveal a busy street with moving traffic below, surrounded by towering urban buildings and large digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, neon-lit corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a futuristic city. It begins in a dark, narrow passage illuminated by teal floor strips before emerging into a bright, semi-covered dining area where purple metallic chairs sit under a glass skylight casting grid-patterned shadows. As the camera exits through metal doors, the environment shifts from the shaded interior to the harsh midday sun of an open plaza scattered with debris, moving steadily beneath a massive concrete overpass. The scene then transitions back into a covered pedestrian walkway defined by purple neon frames and digital displays, following yellow tactile paving toward a set of stairs. Finally, the camera ascends a concrete staircase with teal railings, breaking out from the enclosed path to an elevated overlook that reveals a bustling street of moving traffic and towering digital billboards.
